content:
The user wants me to create webpage 3 (page-3.html) and link it back to page 2, while preserving the existing page 1 and page 2 links. Looking at the existing files: - site/index.html - exists with title "Entropy Page 1" and has data-entropy-shared-table="factory-links" - site/page-2.html - exists with title "Entropy Page 2" and links back to index.html For this stage (web-003-chain-link, Order: 3): - I need to create site/page-3.html - page-3.html must have title text including 'Entropy Page 3' - page-3.html backlink href must be 'page-2.html' The validators that will run: - page-3-links-page-2: failure_class=link_integrity - previous-links-preserved: failure_class=link_integrity So I need to: 1. Create page-3.html with title "Entropy Page 3" and a backlink to page-2.html 2. Make sure I don't break the existing links in index.html and page-2.html Let me create the page-3.html file: { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": "\n\n\n \n \n Entropy Page 3\n\n\n
\n Back to Entropy Page 2\n
\n
\n

Welcome to Entropy Page 3

\n

This is the third page in the chain.

\n
\n\n" } ], "notes": "Created page-3.html with title containing 'Entropy Page 3' and backlink href pointing to 'page-2.html'." }
